metadata.description: Social/marketing skills organized by BRAND (vertical slice) + generic tools. Each brand is a plugin; channels (LinkedIn, blog, Instagram, TikTok) are skills inside it; the voice lives in the slice, the mechanics in shared/.

plugins.name: marketing-tools
plugins.description: Generic, brand-agnostic SEO and Google Ads tools: brand-voice, content-writer, competitor-analysis, gap-zone, rank-tracker, ai-shopping, static-ads, ads-audit, waste-finder.

plugins.name: mario
plugins.description: Mario's personal brand — personal voice (tech-Twitter, biting analogy, technically-grounded call-outs). Channel: LinkedIn. Example of a private brand plugin — lives in user/, not published in the repo.

plugins.name: 4gentes
plugins.description: 4gentes content — the company's voice. Channels: blog (Strapi, op-ed FMB + Lima Barreto + nerd), LinkedIn and Instagram. Example of a private brand plugin — lives in user/, not published in the repo.

plugins.name: katana
plugins.description: Katana (clothing brand) — the brand's voice. Channels: main Instagram, sub-brand Instagram, and TikTok. Example of a private brand plugin — lives in user/, not published in the repo.
